curation_notes: Patch modifies only one source file (paddle/phi/infermeta/unary.cc) in the DiagonalInferMeta function. The fix adds PADDLE_ENFORCE_GE bounds checks for axis1_ and axis2_ after normalization to ensure they are non-negative. Without these checks, extremely large negative axis values (e.g., -1000000) cause the normalization (x_dims.size() + axis) to still produce a negative index, leading to out-of-bounds memory access classified as use-after-free. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern — the other infermeta files (binary.cc, multiary.cc, etc.) handle different operations. Pre-assigned class use-after-free (CWE-416) matches the advisory description and patch behavior.
